final_prompt.prompt:
Create a photorealistic product shot of a corporate employee ID badge for 字节跳动 (ByteDance), showing both front and back sides.

Style/medium: photorealistic studio product photography, clean and corporate, sharp focus throughout
Composition: two badges displayed side by side — front face on the left, back face on the right — slight 5-degree tilt on each, floating on a neutral surface, top-down with subtle perspective
Subject: corporate lanyard ID badge; front side features the 字节跳动 logo at top, employee photo placeholder (portrait cutout area), employee name in Chinese and English, department, employee ID number, and a colored access-level stripe; back side features a magnetic stripe, barcode or QR code, company address in small print, and emergency contact line
Scene/backdrop: clean light-gray studio surface, very subtle soft shadow beneath each badge
Lighting/mood: soft diffused overhead studio light, slight specular highlight on the badge laminate surface to convey glossy plastic card texture, neutral and corporate mood
Color palette: white card base, 字节跳动 brand red/orange as accent stripe, black text, subtle gray secondary elements
Materials/textures: glossy PVC card surface with visible laminate sheen, printed ink texture on card face, matte lanyard clip hardware in brushed silver
Text (verbatim): "字节跳动"
Constraints: both badge faces must be fully legible and in frame; badge proportions must follow standard CR80 ID card ratio (85.6mm × 54mm); photorealistic rendering only
Avoid: cartoon or flat illustration style, floating UI mockup aesthetic, illegible micro-text blobs, over-exposed blown-out highlights, generic stock-photo badge template look
